title: rosa × dumetorum var. subglabra
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. subglabra, also known as Rosa dumetorum, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum var. subglabra include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and support cardiovascular health. In herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
